name: high-near-critical

notes: Length 110000/128000=0.859→bucket=90. Context (126000/128000)=0.984→bucket=95. Ambiguity: 13 matches/15 words=0.867→bucket=90. Structural=100. Volatility: comprehensive(+25), 16000<220000→bucket=25. Score=83.
